    Modifizierer und Typ
    Methode
    Beschreibung
    static Player
    PlayerController.createNewPlayer(String name, String gender, Game game)
    Creates a new player with default attributes and starter items.
    static Player
    GameController.getPlayer(Game game)
    Returns the current player.
    static Player
    SavedataHandler.load()
    Loads the player from the save data file.
    Methoden in controller mit Parametern vom Typ Player
    Modifizierer und Typ
    Methode
    Beschreibung
    static void
    EncounterSystem.battle(GameFrame frame, BattleView battleView, List<EnemyPanel> enemyPanels, Player player, JButton[] buttons)
    Configures the battle actions and registers their event listeners.
    static void
    PlayerController.equip(Player player, Item item)
    Equips the specified item.
    static List<Item>
    PlayerController.getConsumables(Player player)
    Returns all consumable items currently stored in the player's inventory.
    static int
    PlayerController.getDamage(Player player)
    Returns the player's current damage value.
    static int
    PlayerController.getDefense(Player player)
    Returns the player's current defense value.
    static Item
    PlayerController.getEquipment(Player player, EquipmentSlot slot)
    Returns the item equipped in the specified equipment slot.
    static List<Item>
    PlayerController.getEquipments(Player player, Itemtype type)
    Returns all equipment items of the specified item type that are available in the player's inventory.
    static Direction
    PlayerController.getFacing(Player player)
    Returns the direction the player is currently facing.
    static int
    PlayerController.getHealth(Player player)
    Returns the player's current health.
    static String
    PlayerController.getImagepath(Player player)
    Returns the file path of the player's sprite image.
    static Set<Map.Entry<Item,Integer>>
    PlayerController.getInventory(Player player)
    Returns all inventory entries including their quantities.
    static Map.Entry<Item,Integer>
    PlayerController.getItemFromInventory(Player player, String selected)
    Returns the inventory entry for the specified item name.
    static int
    PlayerController.getMaxHealth(Player player)
    Returns the player's maximum health.
    static String
    PlayerController.getName(Player player)
    Returns the player's name.
    static int
    PlayerController.getX(Player player)
    Returns the player's current x-coordinate.
    static int
    PlayerController.getY(Player player)
    Returns the player's current y-coordinate.
    static void
    PlayerController.move(Player player, Direction dir)
    Moves the player one tile in the specified direction.
    static void
    SavedataHandler.save(Player player)
    Saves the specified player to the save data file.
    static void
    GameController.setPlayer(Game game, Player player)
    Sets the current player for the game.
    static void
    PlayerController.turnLeft(Player player)
    Rotates the player 90 degrees to the left.
    static void
    PlayerController.turnRight(Player player)
    Rotates the player 90 degrees to the right.
    static void
    PlayerController.unequip(Player player, EquipmentSlot slot)
    Removes the currently equipped item from the specified equipment slot.
